将使用 SillyTavern 当前启用的 API 设置。: The currently active SillyTavern API settings will be used.
当 AI 回复数量超过该值时，旧回复会被隐藏，并在生成时用已保存的摘要替代。: When AI replies exceed this value, older replies will be hidden and replaced by saved summaries during generation.
请先填写自定义端点。: Please enter a custom endpoint first.
开启后会在总结时维护当前故事时间，并注入到人物信息上方。: When enabled, summaries will maintain the current story time and inject it above character information.
开启后会在总结时提取主要角色和会重复出现的次要角色，并注入到后续提示词中。: When enabled, summaries will extract major characters and recurring minor characters, then inject them into later prompts.
当前聊天记录还没有总结。: No summaries exist for the current chat yet.
当前聊天记录还没有人物信息。: No character information exists for the current chat yet.
